column1:
Declare and initialize integer variables.  
Understand the process of memory allocation for variables by the compiler.  
Write assignment statements to update the value of variables.  
Recognize the importance of initializing variables before use to avoid undefined behavior.  
Identify and correct common errors related to variable usage and assignment.
